overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy RPG showing a hooded player character walking through a rainy medieval castle courtyard, passing a stationary banner-bearing NPC guard and approaching a stone fortress entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy castle courtyard with heraldic banner post

agents.ego_description: walking past a stationary banner guard in a rainy courtyard, heading toward the fortress entrance

notable_agents.action: standing motionless holding a tall red and white heraldic banner

entered.detail: large moss-covered stone ramparts with crenellations towering above the courtyard
tall wooden pole with red and white crossed flag hanging limp in the rain
crude wooden structure with thatched roof situated in the muddy courtyard
bare deciduous trees with twisted branches against the stone wall
broken stone walls and rubble partially covered in grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, rainy castle courtyard with the hooded player character walking forward. To the right stands a stationary NPC guard holding a tall heraldic banner, while ahead loom massive moss-covered stone fortress walls. The ground is muddy and wet, with crude wooden structures and bare trees visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching stone staircase entrance to inner keep

events.description: moving from open courtyard toward the enclosed fortress entrance as the banner guard falls behind

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the stone stairs and entrance of the fortress, leaving the courtyard behind

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading up to the dark fortress entrance
massive stone arch marking the entrance to the inner keep

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper toward the fortress, leaving the banner guard behind. The stone staircase and archway entrance become prominent in the center frame as the fortress walls loom closer. The wooden market stall fades into the distance while the bare trees recede to the right background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy castle courtyard that gradually closes in on a massive stone fortress entrance. It begins with a hooded character walking forward across muddy ground, passing a stationary guard holding a tall heraldic banner to the right. As the character advances, the wooden market stalls and bare trees recede into the background, shifting the focus toward the looming, moss-covered walls ahead. The scene then narrows as the character leaves the open courtyard behind, bringing a stone staircase and a dark archway into prominent center frame.
